name: How long can AEO last after case ends?
description: **Forever unless order says otherwise.** Destroy post-case.[2]

mainEntity.name: How long can AEO last after case ends?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Forever unless order says otherwise.** Destroy post-case.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **AEO obligations survive case end indefinitely unless order specifies.** Return/destroy materials post-judgment.[2] Key factors: Perpetual for trade secrets. Audit compliance. No republication ever. Negotiate sunset in order. Document destruction proof.
